inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakaan mehsoos kar rahi hoon, sar dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Ab main sukhhi khansi mehsoos kar rahi hoon, par bukhar thoda kam ho gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Bukhar thoda kam ho gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak koi vishisht lakshan nahi hain

inputs.text: Main raat ko pasina mehsoos karti hoon, khansi 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai, aur wazan bhi kam ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Raat ko pasina, khansi 2 hafte se zyada, aur wazan kam hona Tuberculosis ke lakshan hain

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Sukhhi khansi abhi tak hai par anya lakshan nahi hain

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Petechiae rash spots on torso dekhne ko mil rahe hain

inputs.text: Ab main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar rahi hoon, aur khansi ke saath kabhi-kabhi balgam mein khoon bhi aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Balgam mein khoon aur kamzori Tuberculosis ke lakshan hain
